# Code Index

Generated file-level index for the code/config/script files in this repository.
GitHub repository trees cannot store custom descriptions next to filenames; this file is the maintained equivalent.

Total indexed files: **10351**

## Top-Level Areas

| Path | Description | Files |
| --- | --- | ---: |
| `autodl-tmp_code/` | Experiment-specific scripts copied from /root/autodl-tmp, including GRPO/OPD/RLM runs, eval utilities, patch scripts, and reproduced experiment configs. | 6489 |
| `root_Albatross/` | Albatross reference code, especially the Math500 evaluation and fast RWKV rollout implementation used for alignment. | 72 |
| `root_OpenRLHF/` | OpenRLHF framework copy used for early PPO/GRPO/RLHF reproduction attempts. | 74 |
| `root_RWKV-LM/` | RWKV-LM source tree and local RWKV-7/Albatross training/evaluation code used as the main model backend. | 2784 |
| `root_top_level/` | Top-level server helper scripts for evaluation, cleanup, inspection, and small patches. | 40 |
| `root_verl/` | veRL framework copy used as a reference implementation for GRPO-style RL training. | 892 |

## `root_top_level/`

Top-level server helper scripts for evaluation, cleanup, inspection, and small patches.

| File | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [`root_top_level/category_rwkv_stem.py`](root_top_level/category_rwkv_stem.py) | Code/configuration file included in the server export. |
| [`root_top_level/category_stem_runs.py`](root_top_level/category_stem_runs.py) | Code/configuration file included in the server export. |
| [`root_top_level/category_step600_eval.py`](root_top_level/category_step600_eval.py) | evaluation script or evaluation runner. |
| [`root_top_level/check_continue500.py`](root_top_level/check_continue500.py) | sanity check or consistency validation script. |
| [`root_top_level/check_g1e_shape.py`](root_top_level/check_g1e_shape.py) | sanity check or consistency validation script. |
| [`root_top_level/check_logp_consistency.py`](root_top_level/check_logp_consistency.py) | Python module with classes: Args; functions: build_prompt |
| [`root_top_level/check_openrlhf_env.py`](root_top_level/check_openrlhf_env.py) | sanity check or consistency validation script. |
| [`root_top_level/check_rwkv7_z_mutation.py`](root_top_level/check_rwkv7_z_mutation.py) | sanity check or consistency validation script. |
| [`root_top_level/check_shape_map.py`](root_top_level/check_shape_map.py) | Python module with classes: Args |
| [`root_top_level/cleanup_all_remote_logs.sh`](root_top_level/cleanup_all_remote_logs.sh) | cleanup helper; intended to remove generated artifacts only. |
| [`root_top_level/cleanup_remote_logs.sh`](root_top_level/cleanup_remote_logs.sh) | cleanup helper; intended to remove generated artifacts only. |
| [`root_top_level/disable_hard_buffer_patch.py`](root_top_level/disable_hard_buffer_patch.py) | one-off code patch helper. |
| [`root_top_level/eval_mmlupro_stem_textonly_rwkv.py`](root_top_level/eval_mmlupro_stem_textonly_rwkv.py) | Python module with functions: extract_choice, load_rwkv, read_rows, main |
| [`root_top_level/eval_mmmu_textonly_rwkv.py`](root_top_level/eval_mmmu_textonly_rwkv.py) | Python module with functions: extract_choice, parse_options, normalize_answer, build_prompt |
| [`root_top_level/inspect_completions_run.py`](root_top_level/inspect_completions_run.py) | inspection/debugging helper. |
| [`root_top_level/inspect_data_pt.py`](root_top_level/inspect_data_pt.py) | inspection/debugging helper. |
| [`root_top_level/inspect_data_pt2.py`](root_top_level/inspect_data_pt2.py) | inspection/debugging helper. |
| [`root_top_level/inspect_nonboxed_correct.py`](root_top_level/inspect_nonboxed_correct.py) | Python module with functions: prompt_to_key |
| [`root_top_level/inspect_parquet_math.py`](root_top_level/inspect_parquet_math.py) | inspection/debugging helper. |
| [`root_top_level/lr_sweep_launcher.sh`](root_top_level/lr_sweep_launcher.sh) | hyperparameter sweep launcher or summarizer; learning-rate sweep or learning-rate experiment helper. |
